languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

languages.text: "Хороший вопрос, дознаватель. Уверен, вы в курсе, что попытка осквернить усыпальницу Вольного Торговца — страшное оскорбление для династии фон Валанциус".
languages.translation_comment: Inquisitorial items found in the Trazin Museum

languages.text: 「いい質問ですね、尋問官。ローグトレーダーの墓を汚そうとすることは、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の誇りに対する重大な侮辱であることを、ご存じでしょう」
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「いい質問ですね、尋問官。ローグトレーダーの墓を汚そうとすることは、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の誇りに対する重大な侮辱であることを、ご存じでしょう」

languages.text: « Excellente question, interrogateur. Vous savez certainement que la profanation du tombeau d'un libre-marchand est un terrible affront à la dynastie von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Excellente question, interrogateur. Vous savez certainement que la profanation du tombeau d'un libre-marchand est un terrible affront à la dynastie von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Eine gute Frage, Interrogator. Ich bin sicher, Euch ist bewusst, dass jeder Versuch, das Grab eines Freihändlers zu entweihen, ein schwerer Affront gegen die Dynastie derer von Valancius ist."
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Eine gute Frage, Interrogator. Ich bin sicher, Euch ist bewusst, dass jeder Versuch, das Grab eines Freihändlers zu entweihen, ein schwerer Affront gegen die Dynastie derer von Valancius ist."

languages.text: "Güzel bir soru Sorgucu. Eminim bir Hür Tacir'in mezarına saygısızlık etme girişiminin, von Valancius hanedanlığına ağır bir hakaret olduğunun farkındasınızdır."
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Güzel bir soru Sorgucu. Eminim bir Hür Tacir'in mezarına saygısızlık etme girişiminin, von Valancius hanedanlığına ağır bir hakaret olduğunun farkındasınızdır."

languages.text: «Buena pregunta, interrogador. Sin duda es usted consciente de que intentar profanar la tumba de un Comerciante Independiente constituye una grave afrenta contra la dinastía von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Buena pregunta, interrogador. Sin duda es usted consciente de que intentar profanar la tumba de un Comerciante Independiente constituye una grave afrenta contra la dinastía von Valancius».

languages.text: “问得好，审讯官。想必你也知道，试图亵渎行商浪人之墓是对冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的极大侮辱。”
languages.original_text: "A good question, Interrogator. I am sure you are aware that an attempt to desecrate a Rogue Trader's tomb is a grievous affront to the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “问得好，审讯官。想必你也知道，试图亵渎行商浪人之墓是对冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的极大侮辱。”
